text:
There once was a little hedgehog named Holly. Holly loved to explore, discover strange things, and collect bugs for her nocturnal escapades.

One evening, Holly was wandering near Dancer's Gap when she came across a peculiar rock. It had glittering lines spiraling around it. Holly felt compelled to pick it up. As she did, a spark flew out, and suddenly she was enveloped in a magical glow!

When the glow dimmed, Holly found herself hovering above the rock. It glowed warmly, illuminating a small, twinkling hole within its center. Through this tiny portal she glimpsed an ethereal world.

With curiosity piqued, Holly went inside. The hole opened onto a field of stars twinkling like diamonds. In the center stood an inviting little cottage.

Entering, Holly discovered a wise old owl perched on a gnarled branch. "Well met," the owl whispered. "You have found a wishing rock. Let me know what you wish
